webinars.title: Mastering Music Theory Basics
webinars.description: Join us for a live session covering scales, intervals, and chord construction. Perfect for beginners who want to build a solid foundation in music theory.

webinars.title: Songwriting Workshop: Find Your Voice
webinars.description: Learn how to craft compelling melodies and meaningful lyrics. Our expert instructor will walk you through the creative process from idea to finished song.

webinars.title: Intro to Music Production with Ableton
webinars.description: Discover how to set up your DAW, create your first beat, and start producing professional-quality music from the comfort of your home studio.

webinars.title: Guitar Techniques for Intermediate Players
webinars.description: Take your guitar skills to the next level with advanced chord voicings, fingerpicking patterns, and improvisation techniques with a live Q&A session.

webinars.title: Vocal Performance & Stage Presence
webinars.description: Learn how to command the stage, control your breath, and deliver powerful vocal performances. Open to singers of all levels.

webinars.title: Music Mixing & Mastering Essentials
webinars.description: Understand the fundamentals of EQ, compression, reverb, and mastering. Walk away with the skills to make your tracks sound polished and release-ready.
